message: feat: add cxdb-observability shared lib.sh helpers

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,138 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+# lib.sh — shared helpers for cxdb-observability hooks
+# Source with: source "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/lib.sh"
+
+# ============================================================
+# URL Resolution (priority: env > settings file > default)
+# ============================================================
+resolve_cxdb_url() {
+  if [ -z "${CXDB_URL:-}" ]; then
+    local settings="$HOME/.claude/cxdb-observability.local.md"
+    if [ -f "$settings" ]; then
+      CXDB_URL=$(grep '^url:' "$settings" | head -1 | awk '{print $2}')
+    fi
+  fi
+  CXDB_URL="${CXDB_URL:-http://localhost:9010}"
+}
+
+# ============================================================
+# Session State: /tmp/cxdb-cc/<session_id>.json
+# Schema: {"context_id": "42", "transcript_path": "...", "turn_number": 0, "tool_calls": [], "root_context_id": null}
+# ============================================================
+_STATE_DIR="/tmp/cxdb-cc"
+
+_state_file() { echo "${_STATE_DIR}/$1.json"; }
+
+read_state() {
+  local file
+  file=$(_state_file "$1")
+  [ -f "$file" ] && cat "$file" || echo ""
+}
+
+write_state() {
+  local session_id="$1"
+  local content="$2"
+  mkdir -p "$_STATE_DIR"
+  printf '%s\n' "$content" > "$(_state_file "$session_id")"
+}
+
+get_context_id() {
+  local s
+  s=$(read_state "$1")
+  [ -n "$s" ] && echo "$s" | jq -r '.context_id // empty' || echo ""
+}
+
+get_transcript_path() {
+  local s
+  s=$(read_state "$1")
+  [ -n "$s" ] && echo "$s" | jq -r '.transcript_path // empty' || echo ""
+}
+
+get_turn_number() {
+  local s
+  s=$(read_state "$1")
+  [ -n "$s" ] && echo "$s" | jq -r '.turn_number // 0' || echo "0"
+}
+
+get_tool_calls() {
+  local s
+  s=$(read_state "$1")
+  [ -n "$s" ] && echo "$s" | jq '.tool_calls // []' || echo "[]"
+}
+
+buffer_tool_call() {
+  # Append a ToolCallItem JSON to the tool_calls array in session state.
+  # Returns 1 if session state does not exist (session was not started by this plugin).
+  local session_id="$1"
+  local tool_call_json="$2"
+  local current
+  current=$(read_state "$session_id")
+  [ -z "$current" ] && return 1
+  local updated
+  updated=$(echo "$current" | jq --argjson tc "$tool_call_json" '.tool_calls += [$tc]')
+  write_state "$session_id" "$updated"
+}
+
+flush_turn() {
+  # Increment turn_number, clear tool_calls array.
+  local session_id="$1"
+  local current
+  current=$(read_state "$session_id")
+  [ -z "$current" ] && return 0
+  local updated
+  updated=$(echo "$current" | jq '.turn_number += 1 | .tool_calls = []')
+  write_state "$session_id" "$updated"
+}
+
+delete_state() {
+  rm -f "$(_state_file "$1")"
+}
+
+# ============================================================
+# cxdb HTTP helpers
+# ============================================================
+cxdb_append() {
+  # POST a ConversationItem turn to cxdb.
+  # Usage: cxdb_append <context_id> <json_payload_string>
+  # Failures are silently ignored (cxdb is optional infrastructure).
+  local context_id="$1"
+  local payload="$2"
+  curl -sf -X POST "${CXDB_URL}/v1/contexts/${context_id}/append" \
+    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
+    -d "$payload" > /dev/null || true
+}
+
+# ============================================================
+# Identity helpers
+# ============================================================
+get_git_email() {
+  git config user.email 2>/dev/null || echo ""
+}
+
+get_git_name() {
+  git config user.name 2>/dev/null || echo ""
+}
+
+get_project_name() {
+  local cwd="$1"
+  local remote
+  remote=$(git -C "$cwd" remote get-url origin 2>/dev/null | sed 's/.*\///' | sed 's/\.git//')
+  if [ -n "$remote" ]; then
+    echo "$remote"
+  else
+    basename "$cwd"
+  fi
+}
+
+get_branch_name() {
+  local cwd="$1"
+  git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo ""
+}
+
+now_ms() {
+  # Returns current time as Unix milliseconds.
+  # python3 is standard on macOS; node is a fallback.
+  python3 -c "import time; print(int(time.time()*1000))" 2>/dev/null \
+    || node -e "console.log(Date.now())" 2>/dev/null \
+    || echo "$(date +%s)000"
+}
